text:
Begerossé Union (, Begerose Rengōkoku) is a country located between the Yorbian Continent and the Azian Continent on a yet unnamed continent and is one of the countries of the V6. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 346 

Background

It was originally part of the V5 before the Kakin Empire joined them and they became the V6. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 342 

In the past Begerossé Union sent a research group of 1,000 people to secure a route along the northeast shore of Lake Mobius to find the Unmanned Rock. They entered inside Pap's territory in a steep mountain range. Only 7 people came back from that trip. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 344 

 

Trivia

The Begerossé Union is located on the continent which closely resembles Australia.
